title: 阳光下的罪恶
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\117-阳光下的罪恶-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Miss Brutus joins a group including Mrs. Gardner, Mr. Gardner, Hercule Poirot, and Miss Bustle. Mrs. Gardner suggests a trip to Dartmouth to visit Prince Town Prison and discusses her belief in the pyramids' prophecy and the influence of radio waves on human sanity. During the conversation, Miss Bustle mentions that someone threw a bottle from a hotel window, nearly hitting her. Mr. Gardner retrieves a light purple yarn for his wife, noting he found it in a closet rather than a dresser.

Patrick Redfern, appearing despondent and agitated, asks Miss Bruste to go rowing around the island. As they row westward past Sunlight Cliff, Patrick notices an umbrella on the cliff, which Miss Bruste identifies as belonging to Miss Dunn. Miss Bruste suspects that Patrick’s motive for rowing is to search for Mrs. Marshall, who has not appeared that morning.

As they round the southern tip of Elfin Bay, a small, shaded area, Patrick spots a figure on the beach. Despite Miss Bruste's objections, Patrick rows toward the shore. They discover Elena Marshall lying face down in the sand with her arms spread out, wearing a white backless swimsuit and a green hat. Miss Bruste realizes the scene is unnatural because the cliffs block all sunlight from reaching this part of the beach, making Elena's sunbathing pose impossible. Patrick realizes Elena is dead and, after touching her stiff body, reacts with shock.
